notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien marching, shields with pixel damage, mystery ship, waves, lives, and hi-score; alien sprites are simplistic but functional, and the game plays well overall.
An exceptionally well-crafted clone with pixel-perfect shield degradation, accurate alien movement/shooting logic, and great procedural graphics, though particles freeze on the game over screen.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with working movement, shooting, shields, waves, pause and game-over flow, but the visuals are simplified and some classic behavior/balance details are not fully faithful.
